name: Offer Design
description: Design a complete product offer: value proposition, offer structure, pricing, and positioning — starting from customer understanding.

steps.name: Customer Understanding
steps.description: Build persona to ground the offer in real customer needs

steps.name: Offer Structure
steps.description: Design offer tiers, features, and delivery model

steps.name: Pricing
steps.description: Set pricing model and price points

steps.name: Positioning
steps.description: Position the offer in the competitive landscape
